mapper.select:
SELECT M.DLVY_CNFM_DT AS dlvyCnfmDt, ISNULL(IP.PALT_NOXX, '시공계획 X') AS paltNoxx, ISNULL(UM.USER_NM, '기사배정 X') AS dlvyEr, ISNULL(DBO.F_COL_NM(M.CMPY_CD, 'COMM', 'TEAM', UM.TEAM), '팀없음') AS dlvyTeam,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN M.SO_STAT_CD != '0000' THEN P.PROD_CD END) AS itemCount,
SUM(CASE WHEN M.SO_STAT_CD != '0000' THEN P.QTY ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT P.TBL_SO_P_ID), 0) AS totalQty,
SUM(CASE WHEN M.SO_STAT_CD != '0000' THEN ISNULL(P.SCAN_QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT P.TBL_SO_P_ID), 0) AS scanQty,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN M.SO_STAT_CD = '0000' THEN P.PROD_CD END) AS cancelCount,
ISNULL(IP.MOBILE_TRAN_YN, 'N') AS mobileTranYn, M.DC_CD AS dcCd FROM TBL_SO_M M WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_SO_P P WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.TBL_SO_M_ID = P.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INST_PLAN_M IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.TBL_SO_M_ID = IP.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USER_M UM WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.TBL_USER_M_ID = UM.TBL_USER_M_ID WHERE M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.USE_YN = 'Y' AND M.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND M.DC_CD = #{dcCd} AND M.DLVY_CNFM_DT = REPLACE(#{dlvyDt}, '-', '') AND (M.SO_STAT_CD >= '2500' OR M.SO_STAT_CD = '0000') GROUP BY M.DLVY_CNFM_DT, IP.PALT_NOXX, UM.USER_NM, UM.TEAM, ISNULL(IP.MOBILE_TRAN_YN, 'N'), M.DC_CD, M.CMPY_CD ORDER BY paltNoxx, dlvyTeam, dlvyEr

SELECT MAX(P.TBL_SO_P_ID) AS tblSoPId, MM.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, MM.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, SUM(P.QTY) AS qty, SUM(ISNULL(P.SCAN_QTY, 0)) AS scanQty, MAX(M.SO_STAT_CD) AS soStatCd, MAX(MM.PICKING_LOC_ID) AS pickingLocId, MAX(L.LOC_CD) AS locCd -- 이제 L 테이블이 정의되어 에러가 발생하지 않습니다. FROM TBL_SO_M M WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_SO_P P WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.TBL_SO_M_ID = P.TBL_SO_M_ID INNER JOIN TBL_INST_PLAN_M IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.TBL_SO_M_ID = IP.TBL_SO_M_ID INNER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M MM WITH(NOLOCK) ON P.PROD_CD = MM.MTRL_CD -- 로케이션 마스터 테이블 조인 추가 LEFT JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L WITH(NOLOCK) ON MM.PICKING_LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID WHERE M.AGNT_CD = MM.AGNT_CD AND M.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND IP.PALT_NOXX = #{paltNoxx} AND M.DLVY_CNFM_DT = REPLACE(#{dlvyDt}, '-', '') AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MM.MTRL_CD, MM.MTRL_NM ORDER BY MM.MTRL_NM ASC

SELECT TOP 1 P.TBL_SO_P_ID AS tblSoPId, P.QTY AS qty, ISNULL(P.SCAN_QTY, 0) AS scanQty, M.SO_STAT_CD AS soStatCd, P.PROD_CD AS mtrlCd, M.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, M.CMPY_CD AS cmpyCd FROM TBL_SO_P P WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_SO_M M WITH(NOLOCK) ON P.TBL_SO_M_ID = M.TBL_SO_M_ID INNER JOIN TBL_INST_PLAN_M IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.TBL_SO_M_ID = IP.TBL_SO_M_ID INNER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M MM WITH(NOLOCK) ON P.PROD_CD = MM.MTRL_CD WHERE M.AGNT_CD = MM.AGNT_CD AND P.PROD_CD = MM.MTRL_CD AND IP.PALT_NOXX = #{paltNoxx} AND (BARCODE = #{barcode} OR MTRL_CD = #{barcode}) AND M.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND M.DLVY_CNFM_DT = REPLACE(#{dlvyDt}, '-', '') AND ISNULL(P.SCAN_QTY, 0) < P.QTY ORDER BY P.TBL_SO_P_ID ASC

SELECT S.STOCK_ID AS stockId, S.LOC_ID AS locId, S.STOCK_QTY AS stockQty, S.WH_CD AS whCd, S.ZONE_ID AS zoneId, S.EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate, L.LOC_NM AS locNm FROM TBL_MTRL_M MM WITH(NOLOCK) /* 상품 마스터에 지정된 PICKING_LOC_ID로 해당 창고의 재고와 직접 조인 */ INNER JOIN TBL_STOCK S WITH(NOLOCK) ON MM.CMPY_CD = S.CMPY_CD AND MM.AGNT_CD = S.AGNT_CD AND MM.MTRL_CD = S.MTRL_CD AND MM.PICKING_LOC_ID = S.LOC_ID /* 핵심: 지정된 피킹 로케이션만 타겟팅 */ INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID AND S.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD WHERE MM.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND MM.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND MM.MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND S.STOCK_QTY > 0 AND S.WH_CD = #{whCd} ORDER BY S.EXPIRE_DATE ASC, S.UPDT_TIME ASC

SELECT A.STOCK_ID AS stockId, A.LOC_ID AS locId, B.LOC_NM AS locNm, A.STOCK_QTY AS stockQty, A.WH_CD AS whCd, A.ZONE_ID AS zoneId, A.EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate FROM TBL_STOCK A INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M B ON A.LOC_ID = B.LOC_ID AND A.CMPY_CD = B.CMPY_CD WHERE A.MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND A.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND B.PICKING_YN = 'N' AND A.STOCK_QTY > 0 ORDER BY A.EXPIRE_DATE ASC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBL_STOCK AS target USING ( SELECT #{cmpyCd} as cmpyCd, #{agntCd} as agntCd, #{whCd} as whCd, #{mtrlCd} as mtrlCd, #{zoneId} as zoneId, #{locId} as locId ) AS source ON ( target.CMPY_CD = source.cmpyCd AND target.LOC_ID = source.locId AND target.MTRL_CD = source.mtrlCd ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET STOCK_QTY = target.STOCK_QTY + #{moveQty}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{userId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, WH_CD, MTRL_CD, ZONE_ID, LOC_ID, STOCK_QTY, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER ) VALUES ( source.cmpyCd, source.agntCd, source.whCd, source.mtrlCd, source.zoneId, source.locId, #{moveQty}, GETDATE(), #{userId} );
mapper.select: SELECT A.CMPY_CD AS cmpyCd, A.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, A.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, A.WH_CD AS whCd, A.ZONE_ID AS zoneId, A.LOC_ID AS locId, B.LOC_NM AS locNm /* [중요] 이름을 가져와야 알림에 정상 표시됨 */ FROM TBL_STOCK A WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.LOC_ID = B.LOC_ID AND A.CMPY_CD = B.CMPY_CD WHERE A.STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_NOTICE (CMPY_CD, NOTICE_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, SAVE_USER) VALUES (#{cmpyCd}, #{noticeType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_NOTICE WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND CONFIRM_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SAVE_TIME DESC

SELECT P.TBL_SO_P_ID AS tblSoPId, MM.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, MM.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, MM.BARCODE AS barcode, MAX(P.QTY) AS qty, MAX(ISNULL(P.SCAN_QTY, 0)) AS scanQty, MAX(M.SO_STAT_CD) AS soStatCd, MAX(L.LOC_NM) AS locNm, -- 값이 있는 로케이션명을 우선적으로 가져옴 MAX(L.LOC_CD) AS locCd FROM TBL_SO_M M WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_SO_P P WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.TBL_SO_M_ID = P.TBL_SO_M_ID INNER JOIN TBL_INST_PLAN_M IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON M.TBL_SO_M_ID = IP.TBL_SO_M_ID INNER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M MM WITH(NOLOCK) ON P.PROD_CD = MM.MTRL_CD LEFT JOIN TBL_STOCK S WITH(NOLOCK) ON MM.CMPY_CD = S.CMPY_CD AND MM.AGNT_CD = S.AGNT_CD AND M.AGNT_CD = S.AGNT_CD AND MM.MTRL_CD = S.MTRL_CD LEFT JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD AND S.LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID AND L.PICKING_YN = 'Y' AND L.USE_YN = 'Y' AND L.DELETED_YN = 'N' WHERE M.AGNT_CD = MM.AGNT_CD AND M.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND M.DLVY_CNFM_DT = REPLACE(#{dlvyDt}, '-', '') AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (ISNULL(P.RTN_CNFM_YN, 'N') = 'N') AND M.SO_STAT_CD = '0000' -- 출고 취소 대상 상태값 GROUP BY P.TBL_SO_P_ID, MM.MTRL_CD, MM.MTRL_NM, MM.BARCODE ORDER BY MM.MTRL_NM ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET RTN_CNFM_YN = 'Y', RTN_CNFM_DT = GETDATE(), RTN_CNFM_USER = #{userId}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{userId} WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblSoPId}

UPDATE MM SET MM.CURRENT_QUANTITY = ST.total_qty, MM.availableQty = ST.total_qty, MM.UPDT_USER = #{userId}, MM.UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() FROM TBL_MTRL_M MM INNER JOIN ( SELECT CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, SUM(ISNULL(stock_qty, 0)) as total_qty FROM TBL_STOCK WITH(NOLOCK) GROUP BY CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD ) ST ON MM.CMPY_CD = ST.CMPY_CD AND MM.MTRL_CD = ST.MTRL_CD WHERE MM.MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND MM.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}
